title: Plankton's Greatest Triumph
logline: After countless failed attempts, Plankton finally obtains the secret formula - and what he reads shocks even him.

characters.name: Plankton
characters.description: Tiny green single-celled organism, big ambitions, tiny body, large ego, evil eyebrow, determined expression
characters.wardrobe: small black business suit, tiny bowtie, one giant eye

characters.name: Karen
characters.description: Plankton's intelligent computer wife, sassy and sarcastic

locations.name: The Chum Bucket
locations.description: Lab/factory interior with bubbling vats, metal catwalks, chaos of failed formulas, the vault in the center

reference_notes: Plankton's eye widens dramatically when he finally reads the formula. The key visual payoff is his reaction - shock, then a hint of something deeper.
